docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANUEL, MARLON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VU, SASHA PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT THE ACCIDENT CAUSED HIS ALLEGED INJURIES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MANUEL, MARLON AS TO DEFENDANT VU, SASHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE. REQUEST RESET FOR AN EARILER DATE PRIOR TO APRIL 26TH. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANUEL, MARLON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF MARLON MANUEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SASHA VU IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
TRIAL RESET TO APR-24-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-09-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED MAR-08-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VU, SASHA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY MANUEL, MARLON VU, SASHA
